description: The role a participant plays in a Session (§5.19). Spec canon plus opponent/teammate/coach — needed so combat and racquet/team sports can attribute a result against an opponent (METHODOLOGY-VALIDATION G5).

tokens.label: Athlete
tokens.description: The primary subject performing the work.

tokens.label: Partner
tokens.description: A co-participant in collaborative work (partner WOD, relay).

tokens.label: Teammate
tokens.description: A member of the same team.

tokens.label: Opponent
tokens.description: An adversary in a match/bout/game (combat, racquet, team sport).

tokens.label: Pacer
tokens.description: Sets the pace for the athlete.
